title: aspidium incisum
intro: Aspidium incisum, also known as the incised maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Aspidium incisum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in folk remedies to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
